text:
M1745 (M0620) Frequency of Disruptive Behavior Symptoms This field indicates the frequency of disruptive behavior symptoms. 00 = Never
01 = Less than once a month
02 = Once a month
03 = Several times each month
04 = Several times a week
05 = At least daily CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1750_REC_PSYCH M1750 (M0630) Receives Psych Nursing Services This field indicates whether the patient is receiving psychiatric nursing services at home provided by a qualified
psychiatric nurse. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR
